/usr/bin/ar qc libawscr_core.a CMakeFiles/awscr_core.dir/core/src/dynamics_3dof.cpp.o CMakeFiles/awscr_core.dir/core/src/estimator_es_ekf.cpp.o CMakeFiles/awscr_core.dir/core/src/controller_smc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/awscr_core.dir/core/src/brain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/awscr_core.dir/core/src/planner_bcd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/awscr_core.dir/core/src/planner_intercept_dubins.cpp.o CMakeFiles/awscr_core.dir/core/src/vfh_plus.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libawscr_core.a
